title: Chest Curio Items
description: Discovering and obtaining ancient relics in this cruel world, there are many secrets waiting for you to discover....
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb94a7fc82019b42ea715fd59c97884821fb505c.png)
### _This is a failed theory ..._

----

This mod adds a lot of accessories, but they all have one thing in common - boxes ...

![chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JLysYTEq/55aa31145a34fcf2b1c437579ccb005bc5fb7c09.png)

What is a box? That's a kind of obsession that binds to the depths of the player's soul, I think you'll like it To feel its presence, players need to press the binding key "R" to open it

----

## Main text introduction
![menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/089778d0b6bdf7533df1fc58a465c418f76539ba_0.webp)

![a轮子](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EAEFHW1O/images/4ead7652c2df0baeae0480d6bdc86b5a80d456b1.png)

![裂变](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EAEFHW1O/images/5716104ecfafe36ee6b154cd4e704bcd3eece380.png)


There are terrifying casting artifacts from the abyss here, as well as organ construction components from ancient creatures, all of which have their own descriptions and animations. Is this all about the mod? Obviously not ...
![恶念的铸造者](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8fcdc0f64d31db00bd8d064771e582d6a048bbf.png)

When players acquire a large number of accessories, they can melt them into new items - mysterious metal plates or bionic hearts, which are important items that players will need to use in the future. You can implant a new heart into your own body or feel the aura of the abyss, gaining support for the abyss and decay
![失败的理论](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EAEFHW1O/images/18c48566f763c7ed40169c187e4e4356c5e14372.gif)

_**This image is just an example, in fact, there is no such structure in the world**_

![看起来不详](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EAEFHW1O/images/9a5ade5671597b52004289fab56f98555009816f_350.webp)

---

![一个进度栏位](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EAEFHW1O/images/c43c87913cdc9c0e907a019e4f143119f3b4deeb.png)

_Ancient relics - remnants of war_



When you discover cities of ancient civilizations or mines of laboring people, you will find containers similar to the boxes deep in your soul, where you may discover a large number of items: buried blades, biomimetic pieces, mechanical structures .........



These are extremely powerful entities that you can place in the 'Soul Space' to obtain their attributes. Even if you find these items to be redundant, you can still melt them, which can give you a lot of experience points and gold resources
